overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a snowy rural village with thatched-roof huts, briefly entering a wooden hut, then transitioning to a winding forest path. The scene moves from a built village environment into dense woodland with atmospheric ground mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with thatched-roof huts

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village past wooden huts with snow-covered roofs

entered.detail: wooden log hut with snow-dusted thatched roof
old wooden wagon with large wheels
distant wooden hut partially obscured by trees
rustic wooden fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a quiet rural village. Snow-dusted thatched huts line the route, with a wooden cart visible to the right and bare winter trees in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: outside a wooden hut with porch and ladder

events.description: Geralt opens the wooden door and enters the hut
Geralt exits the hut and walks around the side

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the hut, enters through the doorway, then exits and circles around the building

entered.detail: open wooden doorway with steps leading inside
wooden ladder leaning against the hut wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching a specific hut, Geralt enters through the wooden doorway, briefly goes inside, then exits and walks around the side of the building. A wooden ladder leans against the hut's exterior wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with steam rising from ground

events.description: leaving the village and entering the forested area with visible steam mist

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from the village along a path into the forest

entered.detail: tall pine trees marking the forest edge
dense trees on the right side of the path
white mist rising from the warm ground in the cold air
huts visible in the distance behind the character

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the village behind and enters a transitional forest edge area. Steam rises from the warm ground in the cold winter air, and distant huts remain visible to the left while the path ahead enters the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding forest path surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth

entered.detail: thick tree canopy overhead filtering the sunlight
tall grass and bushes lining the left side of the path
dense vegetation and tree trunks on the right

segments.scene_description: The path winds deeper into the dense forest, with tall trees closing in on both sides. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled light on the trail, and the village is now far behind as Geralt continues through the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet, snow-dusted rural village into the depths of a dense winter forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined with thatched huts and bare trees, passing a wooden cart before briefly entering and exiting a small wooden building. As he moves past a ladder leaning against the hut's exterior, the scene shifts toward the village edge where steam begins to rise from the warm ground into the cold air. The path then winds away from the distant huts and enters a transitional woodland area, where the open village landscape is gradually replaced by towering trees. Finally, the camera follows him deeper into the forest as the canopy closes in, filtering sunlight into dappled patterns across the trail.
